name: Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 2 serrano chiles, seeds removed and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped cilantro, onion, chiles, and salt in a bowl.
Chop until all ingredients are well blended together.
2. Add the chopped tomato.
3. Mash the avocados with a fork, leaving them lumpy.
4. Mix the mashed avocados with the previously combined ingredients.
Notes:
- Serrano chiles can be quite spicy; reserve some to add later if you prefer a hotter guacamole.
- Lime juice can be squeezed over the top of the completed guacamole to help preserve its vibrant green color.
- Use Haas avocados if available.
